examples: He prefers travelling on the subway to riding in a limousine.
The limousine sped off down the road in the proverbial cloud of dust.
His friend, Remi, is taking him in a limousine to a concert.
To register as a limousine company, all ten vehicles had to be inspected at once.
In a written statement, the limousine company said it was "deeply saddened" by the deaths.
